top_stories.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
top_stories.insight: The passing of Alan Greenspan marks the end of an era in monetary policy, with potential implications for future Fed decisions.

top_stories.title: Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected
top_stories.insight: A hawkish Fed under Warsh could lead to increased interest rates, affecting the overall economy and markets.

top_stories.title: Chairman Warsh drastically alters Fed rate statement. Here's what's changed
top_stories.insight: Changes to the Fed rate statement may indicate a shift in monetary policy, influencing market expectations and investor decisions.

top_stories.title: Stocks Fall as SpaceX’s Rout Offsets US-Iran Hopes: Markets Wrap
top_stories.insight: The decline in SpaceX stock and uncertainty surrounding US-Iran relations contribute to market volatility.

top_stories.title: The Extra Reward for Owning Stocks Over Bonds Has Disappeared
top_stories.insight: The diminishing reward for owning stocks over bonds may lead to a shift in investor preferences and asset allocation.

daily_summary: The financial world is reacting to the passing of former Fed Chairman Alan Greenspan, while also anticipating a more hawkish Fed under Chairman Warsh. Market volatility persists due to various factors, including the decline in SpaceX stock and uncertainty surrounding US-Iran relations.
